---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a broken element, failing interaction, or incorrect behavior
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the bug. -->

## Section / Element Affected
<!-- e.g. "Multi-Step Form — Step 2 Next button", "OTP Input — auto-focus", "Toggle Switches" -->

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to section '...'
2. Click / type / interact with '...'
3. Observe the issue

## Expected Behavior
<!-- What should have happened? -->

## Actual Behavior
<!-- What actually happened? Include any error messages. -->

## Browser & Environment
- Browser: <!-- e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 125 -->
- OS: <!-- e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14 -->
- Device: <!-- Desktop / Mobile -->

## Automation Tool (if applicable)
- Tool: <!-- e.g. Playwright 1.44, Selenium 4.x, Cypress 13 -->
- Locator used: <!-- e.g. getByTestId('otp-1'), #submit-order-btn -->
- Error message from tool: <!-- paste here -->

## Screenshots / Console Errors
<!-- Paste screenshots or browser console errors here. -->
